# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deployment

on: [push, workflow_dispatch]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted

    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Execute custom build script
      run: |
        echo "--- Starting custom build script ---"
        # Developers will place their custom build commands here.
        # Examples:
        # npm install
        # npm run build
        # mvn clean install
        # ./build.sh
        #
        # For demonstration, we'll just show a placeholder.
        if [ -f "build.sh" ]; then
          echo "Executing build.sh..."
          chmod +x build.sh
          ./build.sh
        elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
          echo "Executing 'make build'..."
          make build
        else
          echo "No custom build script found (e.g., build.sh or Makefile 'build' target)."
          echo "Please create a build.sh or update this workflow step with your custom build command."
          # exit 1 # Uncomment to fail if no specific script is found
        fi
        echo "--- Custom build script finished ---"

    - name: Execute custom deployment commands
      run: |
        echo "--- Starting custom deployment commands ---"
        # Developers will place their custom deployment commands here.
        # Examples:
        # scp -r dist/* user@server:/var/www/html
        # ansible-playbook deploy.yml
        # kubectl apply -f kubernetes/deployment.yaml
        # ./deploy.sh
        #
        # For demonstration, we'll just show a placeholder.
        if [ -f "deploy.sh" ]; then
          echo "Executing deploy.sh..."
          chmod +x deploy.sh
          ./deploy.sh
        else
          echo "No custom deployment script found (e.g., deploy.sh)."
          echo "Please create a deploy.sh or update this workflow step with your custom deployment command."
          # exit 1 # Uncomment to fail if no specific script is found
        fi
        echo "--- Custom deployment commands finished ---"
